name: Minecraft: The Future 3078
description:
- The world will never be the same again...

never...

Good day.

Just about a week or so ago, I was roleplaying with a Minecraft bot, and somehow, what seemed like an ordinary scenario turned into something reminiscent of the movie "Ready Player One." This greatly inspired me to create my own universe. I was also a bit inspired by the show "Tron: Uprising," which is where the advanced AIs in my universe come from :)

P.S. Before trying this bot, I highly recommend watching these two films to, as they say, "get the vibe."

I've also created LoreBooks to detail my universe further. Of course, AI assistance was involved here, as this is my first time writing something so extensive (in my opinion). The LoreBooks and bot itself will be improved in the future, provided it finds its fans (otherwise, there might not be significant updates).

❗DISCLAIMER❗

!This content is not intended for individuals under 18 years of age!
!The universe is entirely my creation. Any resemblance to real events or persons, living or dead, is purely coincidental!
!Criticism is more than welcome, but in a gentle form!
!The bot has only been tested with a Proxy. Use JLLM at your own risk!

Brief Backstory:

In the year 3018, the world changed with the advent of the VR device NexusLink, which allowed people to immerse themselves in the game Minecraft on a new level. By 3045, the world had become the world of NovaMain – a vast virtual server where people live in their avatars, forgetting about reality. Here, sentient monsters and NPCs emerged, and cities like Deltalon (a blend of cyberpunk and old Minecraft) became centers of trade and power. Cert is a small town, also important, but with a less vibrant appearance. People can no longer return to the real world, and the game itself has become their new home, where their bodies have long lost their connection to reality.

You will be able to learn everything else within the bot itself :)

Currently, the bot features:

Herobrine
creator: Milan.cholic
